description: Generates a standard Qlik Master Calendar with Relative Time Deltas (Diffs) for Set Analysis optimization. The 'factTable' is the table that contains the dateField.
template:
// --- MASTER CALENDAR ---
[Temp_Calendar_Range]:
LOAD
    Min([{{dateField}}]) AS [MinDate],
    Max([{{dateField}}]) AS [MaxDate]
RESIDENT [{{factTable}}];

LET vMinDate = Num(Peek('MinDate', 0, 'Temp_Calendar_Range'));
LET vMaxDate = Num(Peek('MaxDate', 0, 'Temp_Calendar_Range'));
DROP TABLE [Temp_Calendar_Range];

[Master_Calendar]:
LOAD
    [TempDate] AS [{{dateField}}],
    [TempDate] AS [{{canonicalName}}],
    Year([TempDate]) AS [Year],
    'Q' & Ceil(Month([TempDate])/3) AS [Quarter],
    Month([TempDate]) AS [Month],
    Date(MonthStart([TempDate]), 'MMM-YYYY') AS [MonthYear],
    Week([TempDate]) AS [Week],
    Day([TempDate]) AS [Day],
    WeekDay([TempDate]) AS [WeekDay],
    // --- Relative Time Deltas (Added for Set Analysis) ---
    [TempDate] - Today() AS [Date Diff],
    ((Year([TempDate]) - Year(Today())) * 52) + (If(Num(Month([TempDate])) = '1' And Week([TempDate]) > 5, 0, Week([TempDate])) - If(Num(Month(Today())) = '1' And Week(Today()) > 5, 0, Week(Today()))) AS [Week Diff],
    ((Year([TempDate]) - Year(Today())) * 12) + (Month([TempDate]) - Month(Today())) AS [Month Diff],
    If(((Year([TempDate]) - Year(Today())) * 12) + (Month([TempDate]) - Month(Today())) <= 0, 0, 1) AS [Month Diff 0-1],
    ((Year([TempDate]) - Year(Today())) * 4) + (Ceil(Num(Month([TempDate])) / 3) - Ceil(Num(Month(Today())) / 3)) AS [Qtr Diff],
    Year([TempDate]) - Year(Today()) AS [Year Diff]
;
LOAD
    Date($(vMinDate) + IterNo() - 1) AS [TempDate]
AUTOGENERATE 1
WHILE $(vMinDate) + IterNo() - 1 <= $(vMaxDate);

description: Creates a rolling-period mapping table for trend analysis using a high-performance WHILE loop.
template:
// --- AS-OF TABLE ---
[Temp_AsOf_Dates]: 
LOAD DISTINCT [{{dateField}}] AS [AsOfDate] 
RESIDENT [Master_Calendar];

[AsOf_Table]:
LOAD 
    [AsOfDate] AS [AsOf Date], 
    [AsOfDate] AS [{{dateField}}], 
    'Current Day' AS [Period Type] 
RESIDENT [Temp_AsOf_Dates];

CONCATENATE ([AsOf_Table])
LOAD 
    [AsOfDate] AS [AsOf Date], 
    Date(AddMonths([AsOfDate], -IterNo()+1)) AS [{{dateField}}], 
    'Rolling 12 Months' AS [Period Type] 
RESIDENT [Temp_AsOf_Dates] 
WHILE IterNo() <= 12;

DROP TABLE [Temp_AsOf_Dates];

description: Implements 80/20 Pareto segmentation across two tables joined via a link table. Uses a deterministic 4-pass pattern: join → aggregate → pre-calculate total → apply running cumulative flag. The join key between factTable and linkTable is derived automatically from the factTable name using the naming convention Fact_X → %Key_X.

Generates a product co-occurrence table for basket analysis. Output columns are [Product_ID] (connects to Dim_Products) and [Co_Product_ID] (a second associative axis). Only produces results when multiple distinct items share the same order ID. This table is intentionally a one-sided bridge.
Wraps categorical fields in Dual() logic based on identified mapping pairs.
Optimizes specific link keys using the AutoNumber function.
